meta.description: HelloCash Business: two-phase GET cashBook + invoices → map to account.move → Odoo JSON-RPC. Triggers: Schedule Hourly OR When clicking Test workflow. Env: HELLOCASH_BASE_URL, HELLOCASH_API_TOKEN, ODOO_* incl. ODOO_PASSWORD (validated in Config, not in output json), TAX_ID_19 (19% USt) and TAX_ID_7, accounts, HELLOCASH_LIST_PATH default /api/v1/cashBook, optional HELLOCASH_QUERY_FROM/TO, HELLOCASH_IGNORE_SYNC_HOUR. SMTP on Send Error Email.
